name: contruction
description: A full-stack 3D construction design platform built with React, Three.js, and Node.js.

scripts.build: cd client && npm run build && cd ../server && npm run build
scripts.install:all: cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.setup-githooks: git config core.hooksPath .githooks || true && chmod +x .githooks/* || true
